concepts.finding: Translation-based recommendation model: user preferences as translations between item pairs. If user likes item i and item j is similar but from different category, then i + preference_vector = j. Outperforms MF on recommendation tasks. Captures user preference transitions.
concepts.implication: Keyword intent transitions via translation: "best budget shoes" + price_check_intent = "shoes under 50." Translation vectors capture intent shift directions. Can generate intent-specific keyword variations.
concepts.open_question: Can translation vectors capture intent shifts (e.g., from informational to transactional) in keyword sequences?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Translation-based keyword embeddings capture systematic intent shift patterns (e.g., research -> purchase) better than static embeddings or MF.
